content.speakerText: These shirts have wine stains on the collar.
content.speakerTextCn: 这些衬衫领子上有红酒渍。
expectedAnswers: Yeah, it’s a tough stain—can you remove it?
I noticed the wine stains on the collar. Please make sure to treat them gently.
There’s a heavy wine stain there. Do you have a special process for that?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确指出污渍位置和类型并请求处理
语言准确性：使用了正确词汇（stain, collar, wine）和语法结构
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含污渍类型（wine）和位置（collar）

content.speakerText: There’s an oil stain on the right pocket.
expectedAnswers: Understood. I’ll mark the right pocket and use a degreaser for the oil stain.
Thanks for pointing that out—I’ll pay extra attention to the oil stain on the pocket.
Got it. Oil stains can be tricky, but we’ve had good success with this one.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认污渍位置和类型并承诺处理
语言准确性：正确使用 oil stain, right pocket, and appropriate verb phrases
表达自然度：是否使用了自然的服务用语（e.g., 'pay extra attention', 'tricky but success'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 oil stain 和 right pocket
